de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.delayedcut

Class DelayedCut

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.delayedcut.DelayedCut

  • public class DelayedCut
extends Object
    This class wraps the information about the delayed cut. It only wraps data but not functional information.
    Author:
    Benjamin Niedermann
